chunks.text: ORDER SHEET HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT MIRPURKHAS C.P No.D-397 of 2025 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S) 06.8.2025 Mr.Tilok Chand, Advocate for the Petitioner Mr.Muhammad Sharif Solangi, Asst. A.G Sindh ********** Through the instant petition, the Petitioner seeks directions to the Respondents for issuance of a certified true copy of Entry No.188 dated 22.11.1993, as well as Sale Certificate pertaining to Survey No.453/B, admeasuring 4-27 acres, situated in Deh Hingorno, Taluka Sindhri, District Mirpurkhas. Learned counsel for the Petitioner submits that despite moving applications to the Mukhtiarkar (Revenue), Sindhri (available at Page No.63 of the Court file), the Assistant Commissioner, Taluka Sindhri (Page No.65), the Deputy Commissioner, Mirpurkhas (Page No.67), and finally to the Chairman, Public Grievance Redressal Cell, Mirpurkhas (Page No.69), the matter remains undecided. However, he states that the Petitioner shall be satisfied if appropriate directions are issued to the Chairman, Public Grievance Redressal Cell, Mirpurkhas, for disposal of the application/ complaint in accordance with law. Learned A.A.G. does not oppose such request and assures that the application/complaint of the Petitioner shall be decided strictly in accordance with law. In view of the foregoing, the instant petition stands disposed of with directions to the Chairman, Public Grievance Redressal Cell, Mirpurkhas, to decide the Petitioner’s pending application/complaint within two weeks from the date of receipt of this order. Office is directed to communicate a copy of this order to the learned A.A.G. for compliance.

In view of the foregoing, the instant petition stands disposed of with directions to the Chairman, Public Grievance Redressal Cell, Mirpurkhas, to decide the Petitioner’s pending application/complaint within two weeks from the date of receipt of this order. Office is directed to communicate a copy of this order to the learned A.A.G. for compliance. JUDGE JUDGE AHSAN K. ABRO
